name: Sharon and the Last Garden
short_description: Cleanse the world with the power of bacteria.
detailed_description:
This game is a 3D puzzle action game.
The main character, Sharon's mission is to cleanse the dirty world with the power of bacteria.

- A unique ruined world
Ghost animals are wandering around on the stage.
Let's relieve them use the power of the remaining bacteria.

- Small Low-Poly 3D Stages
Take action in the 3D world and capture stage gimmicks.
A small stage and gentle music combine to create a unique world view.

- Lightweight and Fast Startup
The auto-save and auto-load functions allow you to easily play this game.
It also works very lightly as a 3D game.
* If the load is heavy, you can make it lighter by changing the graphics settings.
